스가랴 10:1.content: Ask of Yahweh rain in the spring time, Yahweh who makes storm clouds, and he gives rain showers to everyone for the plants in the field.

스가랴 10:2.content: For the teraphim have spoken vanity, and the diviners have seen a lie; and they have told false dreams. They comfort in vain. Therefore they go their way like sheep. They are oppressed, because there is no shepherd.

스가랴 10:3.content: My anger is kindled against the shepherds, and I will punish the male goats; For Yahweh of Armies has visited his flock, the house of Judah, and will make them as his majestic horse in the battle.

스가랴 10:4.content: From him will come the cornerstone, from him the nail, from him the battle bow, from him every ruler together.

스가랴 10:5.content: They shall be as mighty men, treading down muddy streets in the battle; and they shall fight, because Yahweh is with them; and the riders on horses will be confounded.

스가랴 10:6.content: “I will strengthen the house of Judah, and I will save the house of Joseph, and I will bring them back; for I have mercy on them; and they will be as though I had not cast them off: for I am Yahweh their God, and I will hear them.

스가랴 10:7.content: Ephraim will be like a mighty man, and their heart will rejoice as through wine; yes, their children will see it, and rejoice. Their heart will be glad in Yahweh.

스가랴 10:8.content: I will signal for them, and gather them; for I have redeemed them; and they will increase as they have increased.

스가랴 10:9.content: I will sow them among the peoples; and they will remember me in far countries; and they will live with their children, and will return.

스가랴 10:10.content: I will bring them again also out of the land of Egypt, and gather them out of Assyria; and I will bring them into the land of Gilead and Lebanon; and there won’t be room enough for them.

스가랴 10:11.content: He will pass through the sea of affliction, and will strike the waves in the sea, and all the depths of the Nile will dry up; and the pride of Assyria will be brought down, and the scepter of Egypt will depart.

스가랴 10:12.content: I will strengthen them in Yahweh; and they will walk up and down in his name,” says Yahweh.
